workload: 9-prompt D32 B=3 MTP prompt suite plus quicksort verifier rocprof

experiment_config.description: Replace verifier final paro_rmsnorm_out_fp16 + fp16_to_bf16 with one exact kernel that writes BF16 after the FP16 rounding point.

decision: Do not promote. The profile shows the expected one-launch reduction and a tiny host/kernel improvement, but the exact same-suite 9-prompt D32 gate regressed wall and verify time. Experiment code was removed; keep this as a retained diagnostic/no-hold only.

commands.suite_off: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_FINAL_RMSNORM_FP16_TO_BF16=0 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-off-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-off-9prompt-d32.json
commands.suite_on: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_FINAL_RMSNORM_FP16_TO_BF16=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 7200 python3 scripts/mtp_prompt_suite_economics.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-on-9prompt-d32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-on-9prompt-d32.json
commands.rocprof_on: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt) HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_VERIFY_FINAL_RMSNORM_FP16_TO_BF16=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --raw-root /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-on-rocprof --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-final-rmsnorm-fp16-to-bf16-on-rocprof.json
